channel.title: Michal Ptaszynski — News
channel.description: Latest news from Michal Ptaszynski — affect analysis, cyberbullying detection, NLP for low-resource languages.
channel.dc:creator: Michal Ptaszynski

item.title: New book chapter on causal analysis of espresso quality (Springer)
item.description: New book chapter "Causal Analysis of Machine Deviations on Espresso Sensory Quality" to appear in Springer's AI for Sustainability and Global Security.

item.title: Promoted to Professor at Kitami Institute of Technology
item.description: Promoted to Professor at Kitami Institute of Technology.

item.title: Three book chapters on AI-assisted Ainu-language research
item.description: Three book chapters on AI-assisted research into the Ainu language published in Inne, a jednak Dziady.
